description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: ’s Pull Request as "ready for review", the Crafter must ensure that both continuous integration tests and locally run tests are all passing successfully. The only exception to this rule is when the continuous integration tests are broken at no fault of the Spell Team - due to a GitHub failure or otherwise - in which case the
can be marked as "ready for review" if locally run tests are passing. The Crafter must not remove or disable failing tests in order to bypass this rule.
